column1: "I told Jeremy not to move", said Rose. - Rose said she ... Jeremy not to move.
"Look! Rob is on TV now", my mum said. - My mum said Rob ... on TV at that moment.
"He went to Turkey", said Jill. - Jill said he ... to Turkey.
"I am going to buy these jeans", said Nancy. - Nancy said she .... those jeans.
"Do you often get together with your relatives?" she said. - She asked him if he often _______together with his relatives.
"Do you work here" he asked. He asked if I worked____________
"Does he drive a car?" he said. - He wanted to know if he__________a car.
"Does she play computer games?" she said. She asked if she__________computer games.
There are only two options and I’m not interested in _______ of them.
__________ of my dogs like playing with toys.
